# screenstudio-alt

> screenstudio-alt is an open-source, headless Screen Studio alternative (a Claude Code skill): auto-zoom, idle speed-up, keystroke chips, smoothed cursor, and vertical export from the CLI.

## Install (Claude Code)
- Add the marketplace: `/plugin marketplace add connerkward/ckw-skills`
- Install this plugin: `/plugin install screenstudio-alt@connerkward`

## Links
- Canonical README: https://github.com/connerkward/screenstudio-alternative-skill
- Marketplace (all of Conner K. Ward's skills + MCP servers): https://github.com/connerkward/ckw-skills

## Optional
- Author: Conner K. Ward — https://github.com/connerkward
